title: Create: Terraverde
description: This Create Modpack combines the charm of Create Mod version 6 with new world generation, over 250+ structures, and beautiful furniture. More mods are coming soon!
body:
# Create: Terraverde

Get ready to explore and build in Create: Terraverde, a Minecraft modpack that combines the best of Create mod version 6 with a ton of new features and decorations. This pack is perfect for anyone who loves building, exploring, and making their Minecraft world truly unique.

Here's what you can expect:

- **Create Mod 6.0**: Enjoy the latest Create mod updates with new logistics systems, chain conveyors, and more automation options.
- **New World Generation**: Discover a fresh world with over 250+ new structures to explore.
- **Decorative Delights**: Unleash your creativity with a wide range of new furniture and decorative blocks.
- **Space Exploration**: Blast off into space with Ad Astra and explore new planets.
- **Enhanced Nature**: Experience more vibrant biomes with Biomes O' Plenty, dynamic growing trees, and unique creatures from Alex's Mobs with special interactions.
- **Tech & Magic**: Dive into tech advancements with Powah and magical discoveries with Simply Swords.
- **Quality of Life**: Enjoy smoother gameplay with utility mods like AppleSkin, Mouse Tweaks, and JEI.

Terraverde offers a mix of automation, exploration, and creativity that will keep you engaged for hours. Whether you're building intricate contraptions, exploring new dimensions, or just enjoying the beauty of a reimagined Minecraft world, this modpack has something for everyone.

**Community Screenshot Event**
If you have some nice screenshots with the modpack, you can hit me up on Discord @ratzifutzi and I might add it to the gallery!
